title: KC College Merit List 2026 - Quick Overview

detail.title: KC College Merit List 2026 - Quick Overview
detail.short_info: KC College Merit List 2026 for UG courses released at kccollege.edu.in. Check BA, BCom, BSc merit list dates, download steps, admission schedule and FAQs.

content.text: KC College merit list 2026 for first-year undergraduate (FY BA, BCom, BSc and self-financed courses) is being released online on the official website kccollege.edu.in for the 2026–27 academic year. In this article, you will find complete information on KC College UG merit list 2026, including important dates for the first, second and third lists, course-wise merit list PDFs, and the detailed admission process after your name appears on the list.

We will also explain how to download the KC College merit list 2026 step by step, what details are mentioned in the PDF, and which documents you must keep ready for verification and fee payment. This introduction will help aspirants quickly understand the admission timeline and use the merit list correctly for KC College admissions 2026.

sections.heading: KC College Merit List 2026 - Quick Overview

content.text: Kishinchand Chellaram (KC) College, Mumbai will publish the KC College merit list 2026 for various UG programmes for the academic year 2026-2027 in multiple rounds. The merit lists will be used to allot seats in BA, BCom, BSc and several self-financed courses offered by the college.

rows: UG courses - BA, BCom, BSc and self-financed programmes (BMS, BAF, BBI, BFM, BSc IT, BSc CS, BSc Biotech, BSc Data Science, B.Voc Web Technologies etc.)

sections.heading: Courses Covered in KC College UG Merit List 2026

content.text: The KC College UG merit list 2026 is released separately for multiple aided and unaided programmes. Typical courses included are:

items: FY BA (Aided and Unaided), BA Psychology Group, BA Non-Psychology Group, BA Entertainment and Sports Management
FY BCom (Aided and Unaided), BCom Inhouse

Self-financed programmes such as BMS, BAF, BBI, BFM, BCA, BAMMC, BAFTNMP, B.Sc. Biotechnology, B.Sc. Computer Science, B.Sc. Information Technology, B.Voc. Web Technologies and B.Sc. Data Science & Business Analytics.

content.text: Aspirants must click on the correct course link on the merit list page while checking their result.

sections.heading: How to Download KC College Merit List 2026 from kccollege.edu.in

content.text: Step-by-step process to check KC College merit list

items: Visit the official website of KC College - kccollege.edu.in.
Open the “Admissions” or “Announcements” section available on the homepage menu.
Click on the “UG Merit List 2026-2027” link once it is activated by the college.
On the UG merit list page, select your programme such as FY BA, FY BCom, BMS, BAF, BBI, BFM, BCA, BAMMC or BAFTNMP.
The merit list PDF for that course will open in a new tab; download or save the file.
Use the search function in the PDF to locate your name, application number and category quickly.

sections.heading: Direct link to KC College UG merit list 2026

content.text: Once updated for the new session, the UG merit list 2026-2027 page can be accessed through the admissions or announcements section of kccollege.edu.in. Candidates should always cross-check that they are on the official KC College domain before downloading any merit list PDF.
Click Here: KC College UG Merit List 2026

sections.heading: Details Mentioned in KC College Merit List 2026

content.text: The KC College merit list 2026 PDF contains key admission details for each shortlisted candidate. Although the exact layout may vary by course, it typically includes:

items: Candidate’s full name and application number
Category / quota (e.g., Sindhi minority, in-house, open category)
Course / programme name and shift (where applicable)
Merit number or rank allotted by the college
Aggregate marks / percentage used for merit calculation
Any remarks regarding admission status, if specified

content.text: Candidates should verify all details and immediately contact the college in case of discrepancies.

sections.heading: Documents required for KC College admission

content.text: KC College specifies the required documents in its admission notices and policy. Commonly required documents include:

items: Class 12 marksheet and passing certificate
Class 10 marksheet / certificate (for date of birth)
Caste or category certificate, if applicable
Minority certificate for Sindhi minority students, where required
Government-issued photo ID (such as Aadhaar)
Passport-size recent photographs
Any additional documents mentioned in the latest KC College admission circular
